title: freeradius bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:

- Bump release number
  Resolves: RHEL-128083

[3.0.27-2]
- Reintroduce 'Ignore home server ping packets'
  Resolves: RHEL-128083
